entry.title: IDC DJJ11C2131 (23) awarded to FORFEITURE SUPPORT ASSOCIATES, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Delegation must be requested using identified email address.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC DJJ11C2131 (P00026) awarded to FORFEITURE SUPPORT ASSOCIATES, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Delegation must be requested using identified email address.

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: ASSET FORFEITURE ADMINISTRATIVE SERVICES CONTRACT EXTENSION THROUGH 9/30/2018.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

entry.title: IDC DJJ11C2131 (P00027) awarded to FORFEITURE SUPPORT ASSOCIATES, LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Delegation must be requested using identified email address.

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE CONTRACTOR SHALL PROVIDE PERSONNEL, SUPERVISION AND OTHER RELATED INCIDENTAL ITEMS NECESSARY TO PERFORM ASSET FORFEITURE PROGRAM SUPPORT SERVICES ON AN INDEFINITE DELIVERY/INDEFINITE QUANTITY BASIS AS DEFINED IN THIS CONTRACT.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
